perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a bowl of Oyakodon (chicken and egg rice bowl), featuring a bright orange raw egg yolk being gently poked with a bronze spoon to release the yolk. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen tutorial where onions are sliced, eggs are cracked into a bowl, and a bottle of 'Wan Jia Xiang' brand bonito soup base is showcased. (4) The cooking process follows: chicken is pan-fried, onions are added with the sauce, and beaten eggs are poured over the mixture. (5) Finally, the cooked mixture is poured over a steaming bowl of white rice, returning to the opening shot of the finished dish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat classical violin music begins immediately. Sounds of a spoon clinking against a bowl and the soft 'pop' of an egg yolk are heard. (2) Transition sounds (chimes/dings) mark the start of the tutorial. A female voice speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic tone, explaining the recipe and the sauce used. (3) Clear foley sounds are present: the 'thud-thud' of a knife cutting onions, the crisp 'crack' of eggshells, and the 'sizzle' of chicken hitting a hot pan. (4) The music continues throughout, maintaining a high energy level, ending with a celebratory chime as the woman gives a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '療癒滑嫩又邪惡 深夜親子丼' (Healing, smooth and wicked late-night Oyakodon). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a close-up of a large knife slicing through a cereal bar on parchment paper, followed by a woman in a white tank top and denim overalls eating a piece and giving a double thumbs up with an enthusiastic facial expression. (2) The scene transitions to the creator pouring Kellogg's Granola into a glass bowl, followed by shots of her adding marshmallows and butter, then placing the bowl into a microwave. (3) After heating, she stirs the melted mixture vigorously, presses it into a rectangular tray while wearing black gloves, and places it in the refrigerator. (4) The video cuts to a presentation of three different plates of cereal bars alongside three product bags (Honey Almond, Fresh Strawberry, Hazelnut Cocoa). (5) The creator is then shown tasting the different flavors, pouring milk over a bowl, and dipping granola into yogurt. (6) The final shot shows her holding three bags of the product and holding a piece up to the camera with a smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with loud, crisp foley sounds of a knife crunching through cereal and the sound of someone chewing, creating an ASMR effect. (2) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with a bright synthesizer melody begins as a female voice with a friendly and excited tone starts narrating the recipe steps. (3) A professional-sounding male voice joins the audio track to provide detailed product descriptions and name the new flavors, creating a dual-narration style. (4) Ambient sound includes the beep of a microwave and the sound of a spoon clinking against a glass bowl during mixing. (5) The audio ends with both voices maintaining an energetic and inviting tone over the continuous background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "聽這聲音就知道多好吃" (Listen to this sound to know how delicious it is) in a handwritten style. (2) Variety-show style caption: "超讚" (Super Great) with yellow radiating lines. (3) Functional recipe text: "加入無鹽奶油" (Add unsalted butter), "微波 600w 1分鐘" (Microwave 600w 1 minute), and "攪拌攪拌" (Stirring). (4) Brand and product titles: "家樂氏日本纖穀脆系列" (Kellogg's Japan Granola Series) and flavor names like "蜂蜜杏仁" (Honey Almond) and "鮮摘草莓" (Fresh Strawberry). (5) Decorative captions like "手臂炸裂" (Arms exploding - indicating hard stirring) and "好吃一起吃" (Good food, eat together!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Recipe Tutorial -> Product Tasting -> Product Lineup Showcase

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title graphic for the Audi Q6 e-tron featuring influencer Chi-Chi. She is seen walking toward a gray Audi Q6 e-tron at a charging station. (2) She carries multiple brown paper grocery bags, smiling and looking energetic. (3) At the back of the car, she performs a kick gesture under the bumper to trigger the hands-free tailgate, which opens to reveal the trunk. (4) She loads her bags into the trunk and then plugs the charging cable into the car's side port. (5) Inside the car, she uses the digital touchscreen and dashboard. She begins eating a chocolate donut with a satisfied expression. (6) A close-up of the dashboard shows the battery charging from 10% to 51%. (7) The scene shifts to a driving montage, showing the car traveling over bridges, through tunnels, and past green highway signs. (8) She arrives at a local outdoor eatery with a large red 'Chicken Rice' sign and sits down to eat. (9) Realizing she forgot to lock the car, she pulls out her smartphone to use the myAudi app, causing the car's lights to blink in the background. (10) The video ends with a shot of her eating happily and a final Audi brand logo card.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat synth-pop music starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited and friendly Mandarin tone, narrating her experience. (3) Mechanical sound effects are heard for the car's trunk opening and the charging plug clicking into place. (4) The music remains the primary layer as she describes the fast charging time. (5) Soft chewing and crunching sounds occur while she eats the donut. (6) Ambient road and engine sounds are kept very low during the driving sequence. (7) A 'chirp' or lock sound effect is synchronized with her phone app interaction at the restaurant. (8) The background music reaches a crescendo and ends with a professional logo chime.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Audi Q6 e-tron 充 10 min 自我 feat. 美食水水 千千' - Intro title. (2) '用 10 分鐘讓味蕾與心靈同步充電' - Hook text about recharging. (3) '尾門感應啟閉功能（附指示燈）' - Explaining the trunk feature. (4) '充電 10 分鐘 續航里程可達 255 km' - Highlighting the charging efficiency. (5) 'myAudi app 可遠端上鎖或解鎖車輛' - Explaining the remote lock feature. (6) Various road signs in Traditional Chinese indicating directions to Chiayi, Nantou, and Fengyuan. (7) Subtitles in both Chinese and English throughout translating the spoken dialogue.

(3) Throughout the sequence, the female voice reacts with guesses, laughter, and short exclamations, while a faint male voice can be heard off-camera providing feedback or prompts.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female creator in a denim jacket waving in front of the 'Hej!' sign at IKEA Headquarters. (2) She transitions to an outdoor event space for 'Democratic Design Days 2025', interacting with pink ping pong tables and crowd-filled booths. (3) A sequence follows showing various food items, including sustainable snacks and pizza, with the creator eating. (4) The scene shifts to the IKEA Museum, displaying chronological furniture exhibits from different decades and interactive 'peasant life' experience stations. (5) The creator visits the IKEA Test Lab, showing robotic arms testing sofa durability. (6) The final phase captures a Swedish Midsummer celebration in a green meadow with traditional dancing, flower crown making, and a long-table dinner featuring a giant berry cake.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately with a female voiceover in Mandarin. (2) Ambient crowd noise and outdoor event atmosphere are mixed into the BGM. (3) Specific SFX are used for emphasis: a 'crunch' sound when eating, a 'moo' sound near the cows, and a 'fail' sound during a sofa test. (4) Transition to acoustic Swedish folk music featuring violins during the Midsummer festival segment. (5) Occasional direct-to-camera speech from the creator and a brief interaction with a male companion are heard over the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles provide a translation of the creator's narration about visiting Sweden. (2) Decorative hook text includes: 'Democratic Design Days 2025', 'IKEA Museum', 'IKEA Test Lab', and 'Midsummer Festival'. (3) Descriptive labels appear for food items and activities like 'Rural Experience' and 'Traditional Dance', often in a playful, variety-show font.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in purple checkered pajamas stands by an open wardrobe, smells a white sports jersey, and makes a face of disgust. A person wearing a cardboard washing machine on their head suddenly appears, holding a bottle of Lenor scent beads. (2) The scene cuts to a gym where the woman is finishing a workout in a beige crop top and black leggings. She wipes sweat with a towel and smells her clothes with a look of disappointment. The washing machine-headed mascot appears again, pointing at the product. (3) The woman is now on a crowded subway, holding a handrail. She smells her own clothes, realizes they are fragrant, and smiles confidently. (4) The woman is seen in various outfits (blue floral dress, purple top) promoting the product. She demonstrates pouring the white scent beads into a measuring cap and then into the drum of a washing machine. The mascot character reappears in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic pop music starts. A female voice speaks in a tone of mild frustration, followed by a loud, high-pitched, comical male voice that shouts enthusiastically. (2) Ambient gym sounds like a treadmill running are heard. The female voice complains again, and the energetic male voice returns with a fast-paced explanation. (3) Subtle subway mechanical hum and 'ding' sound effects occur. The male narrator's voice becomes more persuasive and rhythmic, describing the product's longevity. (4) The background music remains constant and fast-paced. Sound effects like 'shimmering' noises accompany visual highlights. The audio concludes with a group of voices shouting the brand name and a final jingle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '衣櫃裡拿出衣服' (Taking clothes out of the wardrobe) - Functional. (2) '怎麼衣服洗過還是有味道' (Why do clothes still smell after being washed?) - Emotional/Frustrated. (3) '因為你洗衣沒放芳香豆！' (Because you didn't put in scent beads!) - Hook/Energetic. (4) '好清新' (So fresh) - Effect. (5) '運動訓練結束時' (When the workout ends) - Functional. (6) '雨天後的捷運上' (On the MRT after a rainy day) - Functional. (7) '蘭諾衣物芳香豆' (Lenor Laundry Scent Beads) - Functional/Brand. (8) '遠離換季地獄' (Stay away from seasonal transition hell) - Hook.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a beige fleece jacket and fluffy earmuffs walking on a Paris sidewalk, holding an exceptionally large croissant. The Eiffel Tower and classic Parisian architecture are visible. (2) A quick montage follows, showing her posing with the giant croissant in front of the Eiffel Tower and other scenic city spots, holding it over her head and smiling. (3) The scene shifts indoors to a bright, white setting where she takes large bites of the croissant, drinks from a massive bowl-sized cup, and eventually shows herself having finished or nearly finished the pastry with a satisfied and slightly tired expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo French-inspired accordion music starts immediately, establishing a cheerful atmosphere. No vocals are present. (2) The music continues with a steady beat as the visual scene cuts rapidly between outdoor landmarks. Faint ambient street sounds are masked by the BGM. (3) Throughout the indoor eating sequence, the same music persists. Occasional high-pitched chime sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize text appearances or funny expressions. No spoken dialogue is detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV: 真的有人吃完巨型可可頌?!' (POV: Does anyone actually finish a giant croissant?!) - Hook/Question, curious tone. (2) Decorative Text: '來巴黎就是耍...' (Coming to Paris is just for...) - Playful tone. (3) Functional/Decorative Text: '(好好吃)' (Delicious), '(喝一口茶)' (Take a sip of tea), '居然真的吃完了!' (Actually finished it!) - Surprised and satisfied tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with prop -> Landmark montage -> Eating challenge/demo -> Successful conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in white pants and a pink top walks toward the camera and then jumps onto a large round sofa in a modern living room. (2) She lies on the sofa, resting her head on her hand, with a box of fried chicken on the coffee table nearby. (3) A TV screen shows a parody of the 'Titanic' ship scene with the woman's face superimposed on the characters. (4) The woman eats a piece of fried chicken while crying dramatically; she wipes her face with a standard tissue, which leaves small white scraps all over her face. (5) She looks frustrated at the scraps and the grease on the table. (6) She then holds up large blue packs of Su-Jie brand tissue. (7) Close-up shots demonstrate the three-layer thickness of the tissue, her pulling it forcefully to show strength, and her using it to wipe the table and her face cleanly. (8) She drops a tissue into a toilet and it flushes away smoothly. (9) She introduces wet wipes of the same brand, comparing them to the dry tissues. (10) The video ends with her posing with multiple packs of the product and giving a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music begins with a loud 'thud' sound as the woman lands on the sofa. (2) The music shifts to a dramatic, orchestral style reminiscent of a movie soundtrack during the 'Titanic' parody scene. (3) Sounds of exaggerated sobbing and loud chewing noises are heard. (4) An energetic male voiceover enters, speaking in a professional and persuasive tone to describe the product features. (5) Specific sound effects include a sharp 'swish' or 'zip' sound when tissues are pulled or demonstrated. (6) The sound of a toilet flushing is clearly audible. (7) The upbeat pop music returns to a higher volume as the narrator concludes with a call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) (完美降落) - Humorous caption describing her landing on the sofa. (2) (哭的咪咪茂茂) - Slang caption describing her messy crying. (3) (擦一下眼淚) - Functional text noting she is wiping tears. (4) (滿臉衛生紙葵渣?) - Questioning caption about the tissue scraps on her face. (5) 舒潔厚韌三層衛生紙 - Functional text identifying the product name. (6) 扎扎實實的三層 - Decorative text emphasizing the three-layer thickness. (7) 獨家交織技術 - Functional text about the manufacturing technology. (8) 強韌不容易破 - Decorative text emphasizing strength. (9) 可以安心丟馬桶 - Functional text stating it's flushable. (10) 衛生紙94要乾加濕 - Hook text promoting the use of both dry and wet tissues. (11) 全通路都買得到喔 - Functional text for availability.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Dramatic Parody -> Product Introduction -> Technical Demonstrations -> Usage Scenarios -> Conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair in pigtails and a white tank top stands in a bright yellow room, gesturing to the camera. (3) Transition to a plate of three pan-fried buns; she adds sauce and takes a large bite, showing an expressive, satisfied face. (4) She eats a bowl of thick wheat noodle soup (Damiangeng), slurping the noodles. (5) She holds up two Zespri kiwifruits, cuts one open, and eats the golden flesh with a spoon, smiling widely. (6) A green promotional poster appears on screen with QR codes and event details. (7) She returns to the screen holding two kiwifruits, waving goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music with a strong beat starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Sounds of eating, slurping, and 'pop' sound effects coincide with text appearing on screen. (3) The music maintains a consistent, high-energy tempo throughout the food sequence. (4) The female narrator's tone becomes more informative and promotional as she discusses the benefits of the fruit and explains an upcoming event. (5) The music fades out slightly at the very end as she gives a final greeting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吃台中 Style 早餐' (Eating Taichung style breakfast) - hook, energetic tone. (2) '炒麵 + 豬血湯' (Fried noodles + pig's blood soup) - functional text. (3) '完食!' (Finished eating!) - decorative/hook. (4) '水煎包' (Pan-fried buns) and '大麵羹' (Big wheat noodle soup) - functional text. (5) 'Zespri 奇異果' (Zespri kiwifruit) - brand name. (6) '快充！全台早餐營養GO' (Fast charge! Taiwan breakfast nutrition GO) - promotional hook. (7) '5月15日 - 6月14日' (May 15th - June 14th) - functional event information.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split screen: the top half shows a Japanese website 'Birthday Sushi' and the bottom half shows a young woman with braided hair and a plaid shirt looking curiously at the camera. (3) A graphic of crab sushi appears on screen; the woman smiles, makes a peace sign, and gestures excitedly. (4) The scene shifts as she checks another date, September 29th, leading to a graphic of Inari sushi; she laughs uncontrollably, covering her mouth with her hand, then points toward the viewer while speaking enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately with a high-pitched female voice speaking energetically in Mandarin. (2) Short 'ding' sound effects punctuate the reveal of sushi results on the screen. (3) The female speaker's voice becomes more animated with loud, genuine laughter as the second sushi result is revealed. (4) The music remains constant in volume and tempo until the end of the video as the speaker continues her fast-paced narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '日本最近流行' (Japan's recent trend) and '你的生日壽司是什麼?' (What is your birthday sushi?) in large white and yellow characters. (2) Functional: Dates such as '4月30日' and '9月29日' appear as the website is navigated. (3) Decorative: '螃蟹壽司' (Crab Sushi) and '稻荷壽司' (Inari Sushi) appear as results with an emotional, playful tone. (4) Functional: Variety-show style captions like '(企劃被無情嘲笑)' (Project was heartlessly ridiculed) and '(抱歉為同天生日的人)' (Sorry for people with the same birthday) appear during her laughter.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun is sitting in a right-handed tablet chair, attempting to write with her left hand while looking pained and showing how her arm is suspended. (3) The setting shifts to a restaurant buffet where she uses a right-handed soup ladle with her left hand, resulting in an awkward and difficult pouring motion into a bowl. (4) The final scene shows her sitting at a dining table next to another person; as she eats with chopsticks in her left hand, her elbow repeatedly clashes with the person sitting to her right.

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV:左撇子被欺負日常' (POV: Daily life of a left-hander being bullied) - Humorous tone. (4) Functional Text: '水性原子筆 + 左至右的書寫方式' (Water-based ballpoint pen + left-to-right writing method) - Explanatory tone. (5) Decorative Text: '印得到處都是' (Ink stains everywhere) with a mad emoji - Frustrated tone. (6) Functional Text: '反向湯勺' (Reverse soup ladle) and '左撇子只能硬倒' (Left-handers can only pour with difficulty) - Narrative tone. (7) Functional Text: '吃飯時 隔壁的左撇子' (When eating next to a left-hander) - Contextual tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a grey plaid shirt, opens a brown paper bag from KFC. She excitedly unboxes fries, a bowl of rice, and a box of egg tarts. (2) She opens a large cardboard box filled with fried chicken. She begins eating a single French fry, followed by a large fried chicken drumstick, showing it to the camera before taking a large bite. (3) She uses her hands to tear apart a piece of fried chicken, describing it as 'surgery'. She then eats a large chicken thigh. (4) The woman demonstrates a 'secret' way to eat: she peels the skin off a piece of chicken and places it on top of a spoonful of rice, then eats the combination. (5) She realizes she is thirsty, so she fills a glass with ice and pours a dark cola from a plastic bottle, then takes a long drink. (6) She continues eating chicken mixed with rice from the bowl. (7) For dessert, she takes two egg tarts and stacks them on top of each other like a burger before taking a large bite and smiling with closed eyes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Sound of paper rustling and cardboard boxes being opened. A soft, upbeat, lo-fi background music track plays at a low volume. (2) High-fidelity crunching and chewing sounds (ASMR style) as the woman eats fries and fried chicken. Occasional short, high-pitched vocal reactions ('Mmm', 'Oh') in a female voice. (3) Sharp, crisp sounds of chicken skin being pulled apart and metal spoons clinking against a plastic bowl. (4) The sound of ice cubes clinking in a glass, followed by the fizzing sound of a carbonated drink being poured and a loud, rhythmic swallowing sound. (5) More crunching sounds as she finishes the meal with egg tarts, ending with a satisfied exhale.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我點的肯德基到了' (My KFC has arrived). Tone: Excited. (2) Functional Text: Labels for food items like '薯條' (Fries), '雞汁飯' (Chicken juice rice), '蛋塔' (Egg tart), '今天的主角：炸雞' (Today's main character: Fried chicken). (3) Decorative Text: '分離手術' (Separation surgery) appearing as she tears the chicken. Tone: Humorous. (4) Functional Text: '我的限量隱藏版吃法' (My limited/hidden way of eating) and '雞皮稻荷壽司' (Chicken skin Inari sushi) describing her food hack. (5) Decorative Text: '啊！好像少了什麼？' (Ah! Seems like something is missing?) followed by '(裝冰塊中)' (Adding ice) and '麥克風底家收音' (Microphone is here recording sound). (6) Decorative Text: '超滿足~~' (Super satisfied), '合體?' (Merge?), and '幸福的一餐~~~' (A happy meal) as she finishes.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman in a black beanie and white face mask smiling at the camera. (2) It transitions to a scene at a train station where a vintage maroon steam train is docked; the woman is seen waving from the train window. (3) A sequence follows showing various Australian wildlife: a koala sleeping on a eucalyptus branch, kangaroos hopping through a grassy enclosure, and a tree kangaroo climbing wooden structures. (4) There is a brief shot of a restaurant meal featuring grilled meat, mashed potatoes, and broccoli. (5) The woman is then shown riding the steam train as it crosses a high wooden trestle bridge; she and other passengers sit on the window sills with their legs dangling outside. (6) She reacts with a fearful expression as she looks down from the bridge and later shields her eyes as she explains about coal soot.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic-pop background music begins as a female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, introducing the Melbourne trip. (2) The sound of a steam train's loud whistle and the rhythmic chuffing of the engine become prominent. (3) Ambient sounds of wind and outdoor chatter at the zoo are mixed with the narration. (4) A bell-like sound effect (SFX) plays during a transition to the food segment. (5) The audio shifts to loud wind noise and collective cheering from passengers as the train crosses the bridge. (6) The vocal tone becomes more instructional and cautionary as she describes the experience of getting soot in her eyes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '要搭火車啦~~~' (Going to ride the train!) appearing as a hook. (2) Functional Text: '澳洲 一日動物園 + 小火車' (Australia One-day Zoo + Steam Train) providing context. (3) Decorative Text: '(這也是袋鼠肉)' ((This is also kangaroo meat)) in a humorous tone. (4) Effect Text: '逆砍砍這個腿庫' (Look at these legs) referring to the koala. (5) Hook Text: '其中有一段會腳底懸空!' (One part has feet dangling in the air!) emphasizing the thrill. (6) Functional Text: '會有煤炭的灰跑進眼睛!!' (Coal ash will get in your eyes!!) as a practical tip.

(4) The music remains consistent in volume and tempo until the end of the clip.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman in a denim overall dress taking a bite of a yogurt cake and smiling, holding a plate of the dessert toward the camera. (2) She begins a step-by-step tutorial: opening a yogurt container, mixing it with mascarpone and honey in a glass bowl. (3) She introduces Kellogg's granola bags, pouring the granola into the mixture and stirring it with a black spatula. (4) The mixture is poured into a rectangular mold, leveled, and placed into a refrigerator. (5) Three hours later, she removes the mold, cuts the frozen mixture into blocks, and arranges them in a bowl with additional granola toppings. (6) She tastes the final product with an extremely satisfied expression, accompanied by heart and sparkle animations. (7) The video shifts to a product review style where she showcases four different flavors of the granola bags on a counter. (8) She demonstrates the ingredients (cornflakes, grain balls, dried fruit) on her palm and eats the granola directly from the bag. (9) The video ends with her holding three bags of granola, posing energetically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately as the woman speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic Mandarin tone. (2) Sound effects like a 'pop' are heard when she opens the yogurt and 'shimmer' sounds accompany the appearance of text. (3) During the cooking montage, the music remains consistent while the sounds of mixing and container handling are audible. (4) A male voice-over enters in the second half of the video, providing a more formal, promotional narration about the product benefits (sugar reduction) while the female creator reacts visually. (5) The audio finishes with the woman's final upbeat call to action over the fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '教大家來做 餐廳等級的甜點' (Teaching everyone to make restaurant-level desserts) - Hook text. (2) '步驟一' to '步驟八' (Steps 1 to 8) - Functional labels for the recipe process. (3) '3 hours later 冰三小時' - Functional time indicator. (4) '真材實料!!' (Genuine ingredients!!) - Decorative/Hook text showing satisfaction. (5) '日本纖穀脆 減糖版新上市!' (Japanese Granola Reduced Sugar Version New Release!) - Functional promotion text. (6) '減糖25%' (25% sugar reduction) - Key product benefit text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Recipe Tutorial -> Tasting and Reaction -> Product Feature/Promotion -> Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in a red tank top sitting in green stadium seats, portraying an overly excited fan with exaggerated facial expressions of anxiety and passion. (5) Finally, she runs through the stadium stairs and stands, holding her phone to show high-speed internet connectivity, ending with a celebratory thumbs-up in front of the baseball field.

(2) The music shifts to a playful, bouncy rhythm as the female voice sounds satisfied while eating; ambient stadium crowd noise is present. (3) Dialogue enters as the female asks a question in a confused tone, followed by the sound of a phone keyboard tapping and a 'ding' SFX when she finds information. (4) Mechanical shutter sounds from a camera are heard over a trendy pop track. (5) The audio transitions into a polished commercial narration with clear, professional vocals explaining network benefits, concluding with an upbeat brand jingle.

Baseball rules are so hard) - Categorical label. (5) Functional Text: '接殺' (Fly out) - Search term on screen. (6) Decorative Text: '4. 髮香區第一排' (4. First row of the 'scent' zone) - Categorical label. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a live-action scene of a young woman named Chien Chien in a yellow-walled office, using a handheld fan that blows her hair. An interactive 'Dating Sim' style menu appears with three choices. (2) The scene transitions to an outdoor park area with Taipei 101 visible in the background; she is sitting by a pond checking a digital camera. Another interactive menu appears. (3) The setting shifts to a restaurant (ABV) where Chien Chien is served a massive tower of pork ribs. She eats heartily with her hands and chopsticks. (4) Realizing her breath might smell, she looks concerned, and a third choice menu appears. She then takes out a purple Listerine portable packet, uses it, and smiles confidently. (5) The video ends showing a display of the same product in a restaurant's restroom area.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music plays throughout. A male narrator provides a steady voice-over, describing the woman's actions in a playful, observant tone. (2) Interactive sound effects (a 'ding' or selection sound) play whenever the purple menu boxes appear on screen. (3) Chien Chien's voice is heard briefly, laughing and saying 'Thank you' and 'So thoughtful' in a high-pitched, friendly tone. (4) Ambient noise from the restaurant (clinking plates) and sound effects for eating are audible in the third phase. (5) The narrator's voice becomes more authoritative and promotional towards the end while describing the mouthwash benefits.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the narrator's commentary about seeing the coworker once a month. (2) Decorative Text: Captions like '(自带仙女风?!)' and '(原来是吹风机啊)' appear to add humor. (3) Functional Text: Three interactive menus with questions like 'Your choice?' and options in purple boxes. (4) Hook Text: '开会前来一包, 漱走开口不安感' (Take a pack before a meeting, rinse away breath anxiety). (5) Branding: 'LISTERINE TOTAL CARE' and '李施德霖' appear on the product packaging.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a metal spoon stirring a thick, milky white chicken soup in a white ceramic bowl. (4) A young woman with black braids and sunglasses on her head is shown tasting the soup with a spoon, smiling, and nodding her head in approval. (5) She uses chopsticks to pick up pieces of steamed chicken garnished with green scallions and dips them into various side sauces. (6) Close-up shots feature a spicy red chicken salad with sesame seeds and the process of adding shredded ginger and garlic into the soup bowl. (7) The woman continues eating, showing various expressions of enjoyment while looking directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat RnB/Pop track begins with a steady electronic beat and a female vocal singing the phrase 'I just want to live my best life' repeatedly. (2) Subtle ambient street noise and the sound of people talking are heard briefly during the exterior transition, layered under the music. (3) Inside the restaurant, the music remains dominant, but low-level clinking of dishes and general restaurant chatter are audible in the background. (4) The music continues at a consistent tempo and volume throughout the entire video until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '首爾人氣北韓風的雞湯?' (Seoul popular North Korean style chicken soup?) - Hook/Question tone. (6) '好好喝 排隊值得' (Delicious, worth the wait) - Enthusiastic tone. (7) '蒸雞肉' (Steamed chicken) - Functional label. (8) '腿肉軟嫩又帶有點甜味' (Thigh meat is tender and a bit sweet) - Descriptive tone. (9) '評價兩極但我很喜歡' (Polarizing reviews but I like it) - Personal opinion. (10) '加入人蔘絲跟蒜頭 轉換成蔘雞湯風味' (Add ginseng shreds and garlic to transform into ginseng chicken soup flavor) - Instructional/Tips.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a piece of raw marinated crab held in a gloved hand, immediately followed by a woman taking a large, enthusiastic bite. (2) A transition shows the entrance of a restaurant featuring a Michelin Guide plaque, then cuts to a wooden counter and a waiter arranging a variety of side dishes and a main plate of soy-marinated crab on a table. (3) The woman is seen putting on a green apron with a blue frog logo. (4) The sequence continues with her demonstrating three specific ways to consume the dish: eating it directly from the shell, squeezing the meat onto a bowl of white rice, and wrapping a spoonful of crab and rice in a sheet of dried seaweed. (5) The final phase shows her mixing rice into the crab carapace to soak up the remaining roe and sauce, then eating it with a spoon.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat pop music with rhythmic female vocals and a steady electronic beat begins and maintains a constant presence. (2) Ambient sounds of a bustling restaurant are heard, including the clinking of ceramic bowls and low-level background chatter. (3) A female voice (waitress) is heard briefly in Korean saying 'Gamsahamnida' as she places dishes on the table. (4) Subtle foley-like sounds of eating and the scratching of a spoon against a metal bowl are interspersed with the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '来吃吃看曾经得过米其林的酱蟹' - Hook text introducing the Michelin-starred marinated crab. (2) '很幸运去的时候完全不用排队' - Informative text about the lack of a queue. (3) '第一吃直接吃', '第二吃配饭', '第三吃配海苔' - Instructional functional text labeling the three ways to eat the crab. (4) '调味跟之前吃的酱蟹不太一样', '有点像台湾的咸蚬子' - Opinionated captions comparing the flavor to Taiwanese salty clams. (5) '但总算解锁之前的想吃清单了' - Conclusion text expressing satisfaction with completing a bucket list item.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen or overlay of a Japanese TV show clip where a male character watches someone demonstrate a tofu removal trick. (2) She places the tofu package upside down on a white plate. She uses her fingers to tap two corners of the container's bottom. The camera zooms in as the tofu smoothly slides out of the plastic container and onto the plate. (3) The woman reacts with a wide-mouthed expression of shock and excitement. She then gives a V-sign to the camera while holding the plate of tofu, smiling broadly. Confetti effects appear on screen.

This is quickly followed by a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaking Mandarin, introducing the tofu experiment. An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background music track starts. (2) Two distinct 'tap' sound effects (SFX) are heard, followed by a sudden gasp of surprise from the female speaker. (3) The upbeat music continues as the female speaker expresses her amazement loudly, concluding with a cheerful and energetic closing statement. The sound of digital 'sparkles' or celebratory SFX plays at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '實測 讓豆腐掉出的方法' (Testing the method to make tofu drop out). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with five young adults standing in a line in what appears to be a classroom. They are smiling and looking at the camera. (2) A woman in a white crop top and light blue jeans steps forward to demonstrate a physical challenge. She kneels on both knees on the floor. (3) She proceeds through a series of steps: planting her right foot forward while keeping her left knee down, raising her right arm vertically, and then reaching back with her left hand to pull her left foot up towards her glute. (4) The other four individuals in the background follow her lead, mimicking the posture. (5) Each person then attempts the final step: standing up from the kneeling position using only the planted right leg. The first girl in black successed with a cheer. The lead woman in jeans succeeds easily. The third girl in a black skirt fails and falls over, causing laughter. The fourth person, a man in a white t-shirt, struggles significantly but manages to stand. The final man in a blue striped shirt stands up with ease and a confident smile. (6) The video ends with the group laughing and gesturing toward the girl who fell.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A clear female voice speaks in Mandarin, giving step-by-step instructions for the challenge. (3) The background is filled with the sounds of group chatter, laughter, and excited shouting as the participants attempt the moves. (4) Distinct sound effects are used: a 'ding' sound for successful attempts and a cartoonish 'buzz' or 'fail' sound effect when one participant falls. (5) The audio concludes with a crescendo of laughter and the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '據說這個動作能分出誰運動神經好?!' (Hook/Title: It is said this move can tell who has good athletic nerves?!). (2) Decorative Text: '挑戰!' (Challenge!). (3) Functional Text: '第一步: 跪下雙膝著地' (Step 1: Kneel with both knees touching the ground). (4) Functional Text: '第二步: 右腳往前' (Step 2: Right foot forward). (5) Functional Text: '第三步: 右手舉高' (Step 3: Right hand raised high). (6) Functional Text: '第四步: 左手拉起左腳' (Step 4: Left hand pulls up left foot). (7) Functional Text: '最後一步: 單腳起立!!' (Final step: Stand up on one leg!!). (8) Identification Text: Names of participants appear ('慈妹', '千千', '泱泱', '蔡哥', '得得') alongside their status '成功' (Success) or '失敗' (Failure) with emotional emojis.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short dark hair and colorful hair clips stands in a modern kitchen, holding a blueberry bagel; she looks excited and opens her mouth wide to take a large bite. (2) Sound effects such as 'pings' and 'whooshes' emphasize the transition between different food items and the random number generator on the phone. (3) Eating sounds (chewing and slurping) are clearly audible over the music, followed by a 'fail' buzzer sound effect towards the end when the noodle challenge is lost.

(How many bites to finish the blueberry bagel?) sets the first task. (3) Decorative Text: '毫無鑑別度' (No distinction/difficulty) appears when she finds it too easy. (4) Functional Text: '兩口要吃完一整碗麵!!' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a traditional Japanese room with tatami mats. (2) The ninja and the woman stand side-by-side; the ninja is wearing a full black outfit with a mask, while the woman smiles at the camera. (3) The ninja begins demonstrating a sequence of hand gestures, moving his fingers precisely. The woman watches closely and attempts to replicate each hand movement. (4) The scene cuts between close-ups of the hands and medium shots of both individuals. (5) They conclude by holding a specific ninja hand sign in front of their chests, with the woman looking proudly at the camera.

(2) As the scene transitions to the demonstration, the background music lowers slightly, and a male voice is heard speaking calmly in Japanese, providing instructions. (3) Sound effects like a 'sparkle' chime and a 'ding' are heard when specific hand signs are completed. (4) The woman responds with short affirmative sounds ('Hai!'). (5) The music reaches a short crescendo as they finish the pose.
